intermediate.title: B1 Passive verb forms
intermediate.content:
📌 Câu bị động (Passive Voice) – Cấu trúc cơ bản
Công thức: Subject + be + past participle (+ by + agent)

ThìCấu trúc bị độngVí dụ
Present Simpleam/is/are + PPThe house is cleaned every week.
Present Continuousam/is/are being + PPThe car is being repaired now.
Past Simplewas/were + PPThe window was broken yesterday.
Past Continuouswas/were being + PPThe road was being built last year.
Present Perfecthas/have been + PPThe letter has been sent.
Past Perfecthad been + PPThe task had been completed.
Future (will)will be + PPThe report will be published tomorrow.
Modal verbsmodal + be + PPThis must be done today.
📌 Khi nào dùng câu bị động?
1. Khi không biết / không quan trọng ai làm:
My wallet was stolen. (không biết ai trộm)

2. Khi muốn nhấn mạnh vào đối tượng bị tác động:
Shakespeare wrote Hamlet. → Hamlet was written by Shakespeare.

3. Trong văn phong trang trọng, báo chí, khoa học:
The results were analysed carefully.

4. Với get + past participle (informal):
She got promoted last month. He got fired yesterday.
⚠️ Lưu ý quan trọng
• Chỉ transitive verbs (ngoại động từ) mới có bị động.
• Nếu có by + agent, dùng khi agent quan trọng hoặc bất ngờ.
• Khi chuyển sang bị động, tân ngữ của câu chủ động trở thành chủ ngữ.

✦ Two-object verbs (give, send, show, offer, tell): cả hai tân ngữ đều có thể làm chủ ngữ bị động:
They gave her a prize. → She was given a prize. / A prize was given to her.
The new bridge is being built by a French company.Present Continuous Passive – đang xảy ra
All emails must be answered within 24 hours.Modal Passive – quy định/yêu cầu

exercises.q: The windows ___ cleaned every Friday by the caretaker.
exercises.exp: Chủ ngữ số nhiều 'windows' + thói quen → are + PP (Present Simple Passive)

exercises.q: My car ___ repaired at the moment – I'm taking the bus.
exercises.exp: Đang diễn ra ngay lúc nói → is being + PP (Present Continuous Passive)

exercises.q: The Eiffel Tower ___ built in 1889.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ → was + PP (Past Simple Passive)

exercises.q: The new school ___ built when I moved to the area.
exercises.exp: Hành động đang xảy ra ở quá khứ → was being + PP (Past Continuous Passive)

exercises.q: All the tickets ___ already sold out.
exercises.exp: already = kết quả hiện tại → have been + PP (Present Perfect Passive)

exercises.q: The report ___ finished before the meeting started.
exercises.exp: Xảy ra trước một hành động quá khứ khác → had been + PP (Past Perfect Passive)

exercises.q: The results ___ announced tomorrow at the ceremony.
exercises.exp: Tương lai → will be + PP (Future Simple Passive)

exercises.q: This form ___ filled in before you can apply.
exercises.exp: Yêu cầu bắt buộc → modal (must) + be + PP

exercises.q: She ___ promoted last month because of her excellent work.
exercises.exp: Bị động với was + PP – sự kiện quá khứ cụ thể

exercises.q: The broken pipe ___ fixed by a plumber right now.
exercises.exp: Đang sửa ngay lúc nói → is being + PP

exercises.q: All passengers ___ asked to show their ID at the gate.
exercises.exp: Hành động quá khứ chung → were + PP (Past Simple Passive)

exercises.q: A new hospital ___ be built in this area next year.
exercises.exp: Tương lai + bị động → will be + PP

exercises.q: The stolen painting ___ found in a warehouse near the port.
exercises.exp: Sự kiện quá khứ cụ thể → was + PP

exercises.q: Visitors ___ not allowed to take photos inside the museum.
exercises.exp: Quy định hiện tại → are + PP (Present Simple Passive)

exercises.q: The children ___ given a prize at the end of the competition.
exercises.exp: Two-object verb (give) → were given (Past Simple Passive)

exercises.q: These machines ___ not be used without proper training.
exercises.exp: Lời khuyên mạnh / quy tắc → should + not be + PP

exercises.q: Dinner ___ served at seven o'clock in this restaurant.
exercises.exp: Thói quen hiện tại → is + PP (Present Simple Passive)

exercises.q: The documents ___ sent to you by email as soon as they are ready.
exercises.exp: Tương lai → will be + PP

exercises.q: The road ___ repaired for three days before it was finally opened.
exercises.exp: Kéo dài trước một sự kiện quá khứ → had been + PP

exercises.q: The new policy ___ introduced next month by the management.
exercises.exp: Tương lai → will be + PP

exercises.q: The building ___ (design) by a famous architect in 1930.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm cụ thể (in 1930) → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: Several emails ___ (send) to all staff members this morning.
exercises.exp: Hành động hoàn thành trong quá khứ → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: The new law ___ (discuss) in parliament right now.
exercises.exp: Đang diễn ra → Present Continuous Passive

exercises.q: All homework ___ (complete) before the next class.
exercises.exp: Yêu cầu → modal + be + PP

exercises.q: The concert tickets ___ (sell) out within an hour of going on sale.
exercises.exp: Sự kiện quá khứ → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: The winner ___ (announce) at the end of the ceremony tonight.
exercises.exp: Tương lai → Future Simple Passive

exercises.q: His wallet ___ (steal) while he was on the bus yesterday.
exercises.exp: Thời điểm quá khứ cụ thể → Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: A new factory ___ (build) near the town centre at the moment.
exercises.exp: Đang xây → Present Continuous Passive

exercises.q: The food samples ___ (test) in the laboratory before they were released.
exercises.exp: Xảy ra trước sự kiện quá khứ khác → Past Perfect Passive

exercises.q: This bridge ___ (use) by thousands of people every day.
exercises.exp: Thói quen thường xuyên → Present Simple Passive

exercises.q: The children ___ (give) extra homework because of the school holiday.
exercises.exp: Two-object verb, quá khứ → were given (Past Simple Passive)

exercises.q: All applications ___ (submit) online by the deadline.
exercises.exp: Quy định → must + be + PP

exercises.q: The film ___ (show) on three different channels at the same time last night.
exercises.exp: Đang xảy ra ở quá khứ → Past Continuous Passive

exercises.q: The results of the test ___ (post) on the noticeboard tomorrow morning.
exercises.exp: Tương lai → will be + PP

exercises.q: The email ___ (already/send) before you asked me to do it.
exercises.exp: Xảy ra trước → Past Perfect Passive

exercises.q: The annual report ___ (publish) every January by the head office.
exercises.exp: Present Simple Passive: is/are + past participle

exercises.q: The injured player ___ (take) to hospital immediately after the match.
exercises.exp: Past Simple Passive: was/were + past participle

exercises.q: New safety procedures ___ (introduce) across all departments next month.
exercises.exp: Future Passive: will be + past participle

exercises.q: The report ___ (not/complete) yet — it is still being reviewed by the team.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect Passive negative

exercises.q: All complaints ___ (handle) by the customer service team within 48 hours.
exercises.exp: Present Simple Passive: regular process

reorder.words: The windows are cleaned every week by the caretaker
My car is being repaired at the moment
The Eiffel Tower was built in eighteen eighty nine
All the tickets have been sold already
The report will be published tomorrow morning
This form must be filled in before you can apply
The stolen painting was found in a warehouse
Dinner is served at seven o clock every evening
The children were given a prize at the ceremony
The building was being repaired when the accident happened
All passengers were asked to show their passports
The new bridge is being built near the old one
Visitors are not allowed to take photos inside
The documents will be sent to you by email
The road had been repaired before it was reopened
Several emails were sent to all staff this morning
The new law is being discussed in parliament right now
His wallet was stolen while he was on the bus
The winner will be announced at the end of the event
All applications must be submitted online by the deadline

passage.text: Every year, thousands of cars {{1}} in Vietnam. Most of them {{2}} by workers in large factories in the north. Currently, a new plant {{3}} near Hanoi to increase production. Last year, strict safety regulations {{4}} that changed how vehicles {{5}}. Before these rules {{6}}, many cars {{7}} without proper checks. Now, every vehicle {{8}} before it leaves the factory. In the future, it is expected that electric cars {{9}} by all major manufacturers. Customers {{10}} about the new policies by their dealers.

The old town hall {{1}} last month after years of neglect. The project {{2}} by the local government after residents complained loudly. While the work {{3}}, many historical items {{4}} inside the walls, including old maps and coins. These artefacts {{5}} carefully by experts and {{6}} to a local museum. The original wooden floors {{7}} and {{8}} with stone to match the period style. The building {{9}} to the public next spring, and regular guided tours {{10}} by the heritage society throughout the year. It is hoped that the hall {{11}} as a community centre and {{12}} for concerts and exhibitions.

In this school, students {{1}} to follow a strict code of conduct. Homework {{2}} every day and {{3}} by the teacher within three days. Mobile phones {{4}} in classrooms during lessons. If a rule {{5}}, the student {{6}} to the headteacher's office. Last term, several new rules {{7}} after a survey {{8}} among students and parents. Currently, a new school library {{9}} on the third floor. It {{10}} open to all students by the end of term.

The annual music festival {{1}} every summer in the main square. This year, the event {{2}} to a larger venue because more visitors {{3}} than usual. Performers from fifteen countries {{4}} and all tickets {{5}} within two weeks of going on sale. When the stage {{6}} last week, the team realised that extra lighting {{7}}. The problem {{8}} quickly and the event {{9}} by nearly fifty thousand people. Next year, it is hoped that the festival {{10}} to an international audience via live streaming.

The new medicine {{1}} in a laboratory in the capital. Before it {{2}} to the public, it {{3}} on thousands of volunteers. The results {{4}} very carefully before the drug {{5}} approved. Patients who took it {{6}} to follow up with their doctors monthly. During the trial, some side effects {{7}} and the formula {{8}} slightly. Now the medicine {{9}} in pharmacies across the country. It {{10}} that it will help millions of people.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một tòa nhà hoặc địa điểm nổi tiếng ở Việt Nam – nó được xây dựng khi nào, bởi ai, được dùng để làm gì và hiện tại đang được bảo tồn/nâng cấp như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice across multiple tenses: was built, is used, is being restored, will be opened
writing_prompts.example: The Temple of Literature in Hanoi was built in 1070 and was dedicated to Confucius. It was used as the country's first university for over seven hundred years. Today, it is visited by thousands of tourists every year. The complex has been carefully restored to preserve its original architecture. Currently, the surrounding gardens are being improved to welcome more visitors. It is hoped that a new visitor centre will be opened there next year.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sản phẩm phổ biến – nó được sản xuất ở đâu, bán như thế nào, được kiểm tra ra sao và sẽ được cải tiến như thế nào trong tương lai
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice: is manufactured, is sold, has been tested, will be improved
writing_prompts.example: This popular smartphone is manufactured in several factories across Asia. Each device is tested carefully before it is shipped to customers. The latest model was launched last year and has been sold in over fifty countries. It can be ordered online or bought in official stores. The phone's battery and camera have recently been improved based on customer feedback. It is expected that the next version will be released at the end of this year.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một sự kiện tin tức gần đây – điều gì đã xảy ra, ai bị ảnh hưởng, các biện pháp gì đang được thực hiện và điều gì sẽ được làm trong tương lai
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive: was reported, were affected, is being investigated, will be provided
writing_prompts.example: A large flood was reported in the central region last week. Thousands of families were affected and many homes were damaged. Emergency supplies were immediately sent to the worst-hit areas. Several roads were closed and residents were asked to evacuate. The cause of the flooding is currently being investigated by local authorities. It has been confirmed that new flood barriers will be built to prevent future disasters. Aid has been provided by international organisations as well.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả quy trình làm một món ăn truyền thống Việt Nam – nguyên liệu được chuẩn bị thế nào, nấu ra sao và được phục vụ như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive voice for processes: is washed, is chopped, is cooked, is served
writing_prompts.example: Pho is one of Vietnam's most beloved dishes and it is prepared with great care. First, the beef bones are washed and boiled for several hours to make a rich broth. Spices such as star anise and ginger are added to give the soup its distinctive flavour. The noodles are prepared separately and placed in a bowl. Thin slices of beef are then arranged on top before the hot broth is poured over them. The dish is served with fresh herbs, lime, and chilli. It is enjoyed by millions of people every day.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về trường học hoặc nơi làm việc của bạn – các quy tắc được thiết lập như thế nào, học sinh/nhân viên được yêu cầu làm gì và những thay đổi gì đang được thực hiện
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive for rules and systems: are required, are not allowed, is being introduced, must be followed
writing_prompts.example: At my school, students are expected to arrive on time and wear a uniform every day. Mobile phones are not allowed during lessons, and this rule must be followed by everyone. Homework is assigned each day and has to be submitted by the next morning. Recently, a new digital learning system is being introduced to help students access lessons online. Students have been given tablets to use in class. Parents are regularly informed about their children's progress through the school app. These changes were made to improve the quality of education for everyone.

intermediate.title: B1 Active and passive voice
intermediate.content:
📌 So sánh Chủ động vs Bị động
Câu chủ động (Active): Chủ ngữ thực hiện hành động.
The chef prepares the food.

Câu bị động (Passive): Chủ ngữ nhận hành động.
The food is prepared by the chef.

Chủ độngBị động
Someone stole my bike.My bike was stolen.
They are building a new road.A new road is being built.
She has finished the report.The report has been finished.
We will send the package.The package will be sent.
You must complete this form.This form must be completed.
📌 Khi nào KHÔNG cần by + agent?
Bỏ by + agent khi:
• Không biết ai làm: My car was damaged. (không biết ai)
• Không quan trọng ai làm: The results will be published.
• Rõ ràng ai làm: The patient was examined. (obviously by a doctor)

Giữ by + agent khi:
• Agent quan trọng hoặc thú vị: This painting was done by a child.
• Agent bất ngờ hoặc nổi tiếng: The novel was written by a teenager.
📌 Cách chuyển đổi Active ↔ Passive
Bước 1: Tân ngữ của câu chủ động → Chủ ngữ của câu bị động
Bước 2: Chia be theo đúng thì
Bước 3: Động từ chính → Past Participle
Bước 4: Chủ ngữ cũ → by + agent (nếu cần)

Active: The company launched the product in 2023.
Passive: The product was launched (by the company) in 2023.
The document was signed by the director yesterday.by + agent được giữ vì agent quan trọng
A new sports centre is being built near the station.Không cần by agent vì không quan trọng ai xây

exercises.q: The manager ___ the report before the meeting. (Active → choose passive form)
exercises.opts: The report was read by the manager,The report is read by the manager,The manager was read the report,The report had read by the manager
exercises.exp: Past Simple Active → Past Simple Passive: was + PP + by agent

exercises.q: A dog ___ the postman this morning.
exercises.exp: Active sentence, subject là dog → bit (Past Simple Active)

exercises.q: The postman ___ by a dog this morning.
exercises.exp: Bị động, chủ ngữ là postman → was bitten (Past Simple Passive)

exercises.q: They ___ a new hospital near the city centre.
exercises.opts: are building,is being built,built by,are being built
exercises.exp: Active: they là chủ ngữ hành động → are building (Present Continuous Active)

exercises.q: A new hospital ___ near the city centre.
exercises.opts: is being built,is building,are building,will build
exercises.exp: Bị động, chủ ngữ là hospital → is being built

exercises.q: The teacher ___ homework every Friday.
exercises.exp: Active – subject là teacher, thói quen → Present Simple

exercises.q: Homework ___ every Friday by the teacher.
exercises.exp: Passive – subject là homework, thói quen → is + PP

exercises.q: Someone ___ all the biscuits. The plate is empty.
exercises.exp: Active – kết quả hiện tại → Present Perfect Active

exercises.q: All the biscuits ___. The plate is empty.
exercises.opts: have been eaten,have eaten,were eating,are eating
exercises.exp: Passive – kết quả hiện tại → have been + PP

exercises.q: You ___ not park here. It's a no-parking zone.
exercises.exp: Active prohibition → must not (modal)

exercises.q: Cars ___ not parked here. It's a no-parking zone.
exercises.exp: Passive prohibition → must be + PP

exercises.q: The company ___ hundreds of people last year.
exercises.exp: Active – thời điểm quá khứ → Past Simple Active

exercises.q: Hundreds of people ___ by the company last year.
exercises.exp: Passive – thời điểm quá khứ → were + PP

exercises.q: They will announce the results next week. (Passive:) The results ___.
exercises.opts: will be announced next week,will announce next week,are announced next week,were announced
exercises.exp: Future Passive: will be + PP

exercises.q: The police ___ two suspects yesterday afternoon.
exercises.exp: Active – police là chủ ngữ thực hiện → arrested (Past Simple)

exercises.q: Two suspects ___ by the police yesterday afternoon.
exercises.exp: Passive – suspects bị bắt → were arrested

exercises.q: Shakespeare ___ many famous plays.
exercises.exp: Active – Shakespeare là tác giả → wrote (Past Simple)

exercises.q: Many famous plays ___ by Shakespeare.
exercises.exp: Passive – plays được viết bởi → were written by

exercises.q: They ___ still repairing the road when I drove past.
exercises.exp: Active Past Continuous – they → were repairing

exercises.q: The road ___ still being repaired when I drove past.
exercises.exp: Passive Past Continuous → was being + PP

exercises.q: The new shopping centre ___ (open) by the mayor last Saturday.
exercises.exp: Past Simple Passive – thời điểm cụ thể

exercises.q: Hundreds of letters ___ (receive) by the charity every week.
exercises.exp: Present Simple Passive – thói quen thường xuyên

exercises.q: The broken laptop ___ (repair) by a technician right now.
exercises.exp: Present Continuous Passive – đang diễn ra

exercises.q: The decision ___ (make) before I arrived at the meeting.
exercises.exp: Past Perfect Passive – xảy ra trước một quá khứ khác

exercises.q: All guests ___ (ask) to register at the front desk.
exercises.exp: Present Simple Passive – quy định hiện tại

exercises.q: The injured players ___ (treat) by a doctor on the field.
exercises.exp: Past Simple Passive – sự kiện quá khứ

exercises.q: The bridge ___ (close) for repairs next Monday.
exercises.exp: Future Simple Passive – kế hoạch tương lai

exercises.q: Three people ___ (rescue) from the burning building by firefighters.
exercises.exp: Past Simple Passive – sự kiện đã xảy ra

exercises.q: This rule ___ (not / break) under any circumstances.
exercises.exp: Modal Passive – cấm đoán

exercises.q: New uniforms ___ (give) to all the players before the season starts.
exercises.exp: Two-object passive, Future → will be given

exercises.q: The suspect ___ (question) by detectives for three hours.
exercises.exp: Past Simple Passive

exercises.q: The conference ___ (hold) online because of the travel restrictions.
exercises.exp: Past Simple Passive – reason given

exercises.q: A new vaccine ___ (develop) by scientists in the research centre.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect Passive – kết quả quan trọng đến hiện tại

exercises.q: The street ___ (decorate) with lights every December.
exercises.exp: Present Simple Passive – thói quen hàng năm

exercises.q: The children ___ (show) a film about wildlife during the trip.
exercises.exp: Two-object passive, Past Simple

exercises.q: The committee ___ (award) the prize to a young scientist from Hanoi.
exercises.exp: Active: subject performs the action

exercises.q: A new policy ___ (announce) by the government at yesterday's press conference.
exercises.exp: Passive: focus on what was announced, not who

exercises.q: Scientists ___ (discover) a new species of deep-sea fish last year.
exercises.exp: Active: scientists = doer

exercises.q: The match ___ (postpone) due to heavy rain on the pitch.
exercises.exp: Passive: focus on the match, agent not important

exercises.q: Over three million people ___ (watch) the live broadcast last night.
exercises.exp: Active: people as subject watching

reorder.words: The new shopping centre was opened by the mayor last Saturday
A new hospital is being built near the city centre
All the biscuits have been eaten and the plate is empty
The injured players were treated by a doctor on the field
The road was still being repaired when I drove past
The results will be announced at the end of the ceremony
Hundreds of letters are received by the charity every week
The decision had been made before I arrived at the meeting
Cars must not be parked in front of the entrance
This painting was done by a ten year old child
The suspect was questioned by detectives for three hours
Many famous plays were written by Shakespeare in the sixteenth century
Two suspects were arrested by the police yesterday afternoon
The bridge will be closed for repairs next Monday
The broken laptop is being repaired by a technician right now
Homework is assigned every Friday by the teacher
The new vaccine has been developed by scientists in the lab
All guests are asked to register at the front desk
The street is decorated with lights every December
Three people were rescued from the burning building by firefighters

passage.text: Chocolate {{1}} from cacao beans, which {{2}} mainly in West Africa and South America. The beans {{3}} from the pods by hand, then {{4}} in the sun for several days. After that, they {{5}} to factories where they {{6}} into a smooth paste. Sugar and milk {{7}} to create different flavours. The finished chocolate {{8}} into bars or other shapes. Every year, millions of tonnes of chocolate {{9}} worldwide. In recent years, organic chocolate {{10}} more popular, and fair-trade labels {{11}} on many products.

Last night, a famous painting {{1}} from the city museum. The alarm {{2}} at around midnight, but the thief had already escaped. The police {{3}} immediately and the building {{4}} off. Several security cameras {{5}} near the entrance but they had been switched off. CCTV footage from nearby shops {{6}} by detectives this morning. Two suspects {{7}} and {{8}} for questioning. The painting {{9}} to be worth several million dollars. A reward {{10}} by the museum for anyone with information.

Every four years, the Olympic Games {{1}} by millions of people around the world. The first modern Games {{2}} in Athens in 1896. Since then, the event {{3}} to many different cities across six continents. In recent years, new sports {{4}} to the programme to attract younger audiences. The opening ceremony {{5}} by a global TV audience of over a billion people. Athletes {{6}} from every country, and hundreds of medals {{7}} over the course of two weeks. After the Games, the host city often {{8}} significant investment in sport and infrastructure. Many iconic sports venues {{9}} for community use once the athletes {{10}}.

The ancient city of Pompeii {{1}} by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD. The entire city {{2}} under metres of volcanic ash within hours. For centuries, the ruins {{3}} beneath the ground. Archaeological excavations {{4}} in the eighteenth century, and remarkable discoveries {{5}} ever since. Many everyday objects, including food, tools, and artwork, {{6}} in excellent condition. The site {{7}} by tourists from all over the world each year. Recently, a new section of the city {{8}} using modern technology. The findings {{9}} by researchers at universities across Europe. It {{10}} that further excavations will reveal even more about life in ancient Rome.

Coffee {{1}} by over two billion people every day. The beans {{2}} mainly in tropical regions such as Brazil, Colombia, and Vietnam. After harvesting, the beans {{3}} and then {{4}} to remove the outer layers. They {{5}} at high temperatures to develop their flavour. Once roasted, the beans {{6}} to cafés and supermarkets around the world. In a café, your coffee {{7}} by a skilled barista who controls every detail of the process. Recently, a new trend {{8}}: cold brew coffee, which {{9}} in cold water for up to 24 hours. This method {{10}} to produce a smoother, less bitter flavour.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sự kiện thể thao hoặc cuộc thi – ai thắng, điều gì đã xảy ra, cách tổ chức và kết quả được công bố như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Active and passive mixed: won, were given, was announced, was watched, has been celebrated
writing_prompts.example: The national football championship was held last weekend in the main stadium. Thousands of fans were invited to attend and the match was watched by millions on television. The home team played brilliantly and won the final by two goals. The trophy was presented to the captain by the president of the football federation. The result was announced to huge celebrations across the country. Players were given a week off to celebrate with their families. The victory has been celebrated in every city since the final whistle.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một quy trình sản xuất (ví dụ: làm bánh mì, làm giày, tái chế rác) – dùng bị động để mô tả từng bước
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive for processes: is washed, is mixed, is baked, is packaged, are transported
writing_prompts.example: Recycling plastic bottles is a complex but important process. First, used bottles are collected from homes and streets by special trucks. They are then transported to a recycling facility where they are sorted by colour and type. The bottles are washed and crushed into small flakes. These flakes are melted at high temperatures and shaped into new products. The finished items are checked for quality before they are packaged and sent to shops. By recycling, large amounts of plastic waste are kept out of landfills and oceans every year.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một tin tức địa phương – điều gì đã xảy ra, ai bị ảnh hưởng, điều gì đang được thực hiện để giải quyết và những gì sẽ được làm
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Active/passive mix across tenses
writing_prompts.example: A powerful storm hit our town last Tuesday and caused serious damage. Several buildings were damaged and many families were forced to leave their homes. The cause of the storm was reported to be unusually strong winds from the north. Emergency services were called immediately and several roads were closed. The local council has already provided temporary accommodation for those who were affected. The damaged buildings are currently being repaired and residents have been told they will be able to return home within two weeks. Financial support will also be offered to families whose belongings were destroyed.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một phát minh hoặc công nghệ nổi tiếng – được phát minh khi nào, bởi ai, nó được sử dụng như thế nào và nó đã thay đổi cuộc sống như thế nào
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive to describe invention history and impact
writing_prompts.example: The internet was developed in the late 1960s by researchers in the United States. It was first introduced to the public in the 1990s and has since changed almost every aspect of life. Today, it is used by billions of people every day for communication, work, and entertainment. New technologies are constantly being developed to make the internet faster and more accessible. The way people shop, learn, and socialise has been completely transformed. It is now considered one of the most important inventions in human history.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy so sánh cuộc sống ở một thành phố trước đây và hiện nay – những gì đã được xây dựng, phá bỏ, cải thiện và những gì đang được thay đổi
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Passive across tenses to describe change: were demolished, have been built, is being developed, will be created
writing_prompts.example: The city centre has changed dramatically over the past twenty years. Many old buildings were demolished to make way for modern offices and apartments. New parks have been created and the public transport system has been improved significantly. The old bus station was replaced by a modern tram network which is used by thousands of people daily. Currently, a new cultural centre is being built near the river. Several new schools and hospitals have also been opened. In the future, more green spaces will be created and cycle lanes will be added throughout the city.

intermediate.title: B1 Indirect speech / Reported speech
intermediate.content:
📌 Reported Speech – Lùi thì (Backshift)
Khi câu tường thuật dùng said / told ở quá khứ, động từ trong mệnh đề thường lùi một thì:

Direct speechReported speech
"I am tired."She said she was tired.
"I work here."He said he worked there.
"She is working."He said she was working.
"I saw him."She said she had seen him.
"I have finished."He said he had finished.
"I will help you."She said she would help me.
"I can swim."He said he could swim.
📌 Thay đổi đại từ, trạng từ chỉ nơi chốn và thời gian
DirectReported
I / me / myhe/she / him/her / his/her
herethere
nowthen
todaythat day
yesterdaythe day before / the previous day
tomorrowthe next day / the following day
this weekthat week
last weekthe week before / the previous week
📌 Reported Questions
Yes/No questions: dùng if / whether
"Do you like coffee?" → She asked if I liked coffee.

Wh- questions: dùng từ hỏi + word order bình thường
"Where do you live?" → He asked me where I lived.
❌ He asked me where did I live. (KHÔNG đảo ngữ)

Reported commands/requests: dùng told/asked + to-infinitive
"Close the door!" → She told me to close the door.
"Please help me." → He asked me to help him.
"I'm feeling ill." → She said (that) she was feeling ill.Present Continuous → Past Continuous
"Don't touch that!" → He told me not to touch that.Negative command → told + not to-infinitive

exercises.q: "I am very tired." She said that she ___ very tired.
exercises.exp: Present Simple → Past Simple (backshift): am → was

exercises.q: "We will arrive at six." They said they ___ at six.
exercises.exp: will → would (backshift)

exercises.q: "I have lost my wallet." He said he ___ his wallet.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect → Past Perfect (backshift)

exercises.q: "Are you ready?" She asked me if I ___.
exercises.opts: was ready,am ready,were ready,have been ready
exercises.exp: Yes/No question reported → if + Past Simple

exercises.q: "Where do you live?" He asked me where I ___.
exercises.exp: Wh- question reported → where + Past Simple (no inversion)

exercises.q: "Sit down, please." The teacher told us ___ down.
exercises.exp: Polite command → told + to-infinitive

exercises.q: "Don't open the window." She told him ___ the window.
exercises.opts: not to open,to not open,don't open,not open
exercises.exp: Negative command → told + not + to-infinitive

exercises.q: "I saw her yesterday." He said he ___ her the day before.
exercises.exp: Past Simple → Past Perfect (backshift); yesterday → the day before

exercises.q: "I can speak French." She said she ___ French.
exercises.exp: can → could (backshift)

exercises.q: "What time does the train leave?" She asked me what time the train ___.
exercises.exp: Wh- question reported → what time + Past Simple (no inversion)

exercises.q: "I'm working on a project this week." He told us he ___ on a project that week.
exercises.exp: Present Continuous → Past Continuous; this week → that week

exercises.q: "Have you ever been to Paris?" She asked him if he ___ ever ___ to Paris.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect → Past Perfect; ever stays

exercises.q: "Please help me carry this." She ___ me to help her carry it.
exercises.exp: Polite request → asked + to-infinitive

exercises.q: "You must finish this today." The manager told us we ___ finish it that day.
exercises.exp: must → had to (backshift for reported speech)

exercises.q: "I don't know what to do." She said she ___ what to do.
exercises.exp: Present Simple negative → Past Simple negative (backshift)

exercises.q: "Why are you crying?" He asked her why she ___.
exercises.exp: Wh- question, Present Continuous → Past Continuous in reported speech

exercises.q: "I will call you tomorrow." She promised she ___ me the next day.
exercises.exp: will → would; tomorrow → the next day

exercises.q: "We moved here last year." They said they ___ there the year before.
exercises.exp: Past Simple → Past Perfect; here → there; last year → the year before

exercises.q: "I may be late." He said he ___ be late.
exercises.exp: may → might (backshift)

exercises.q: "Stop talking!" The teacher told the students ___ talking.
exercises.exp: Command → told + to-infinitive

exercises.q: "I am very happy here." → She said she ___ (be) very happy there.
exercises.exp: am → was (backshift); here → there

exercises.q: "We have just arrived." → They said they ___ (just/arrive) just then.
exercises.exp: Present Perfect → Past Perfect (backshift)

exercises.q: "Do you know her?" → He asked me if I ___ (know) her.
exercises.exp: Yes/No question → if + Past Simple

exercises.q: "Where did you go yesterday?" → She asked me where I ___ (go) the day before.
exercises.exp: Past Simple → Past Perfect; yesterday → the day before

exercises.q: "Don't be late." → He told me ___ (not/be) late.
exercises.exp: Negative command → not to + base form

exercises.q: "I can't come to the party." → She said she ___ (not/can) come to the party.
exercises.exp: can't → couldn't (backshift)

exercises.q: "What are you doing now?" → He asked me what I ___ (do) then.
exercises.exp: What + Present Continuous → Past Continuous; now → then

exercises.q: "I will finish it tomorrow." → She said she ___ (finish) it the next day.
exercises.exp: will → would; tomorrow → the next day

exercises.q: "Please open the window." → She asked him ___ (open) the window.
exercises.exp: Polite request → asked + to-infinitive

exercises.q: "We are going on holiday next week." → They said they ___ (go) on holiday the following week.
exercises.exp: Present Continuous → Past Continuous; next week → the following week

exercises.q: "I must hand in the report today." → She said she ___ (must) hand in the report that day.
exercises.exp: must → had to (backshift)

exercises.q: "How long have you been waiting?" → He asked me how long I ___ (wait).
exercises.exp: Present Perfect Continuous → Past Perfect Continuous

exercises.q: "I may not be able to help." → She said she ___ (may) not be able to help.
exercises.exp: may → might (backshift)

exercises.q: "Did you see the film last night?" → She asked me if I ___ (see) the film the night before.
exercises.exp: Past Simple → Past Perfect; last night → the night before

exercises.q: "Get out of my office!" → He told her ___ (get) out of his office.
exercises.exp: Strong command → told + to-infinitive

exercises.q: 'I am preparing the report now,' she said. → She said she ___ the report then.
exercises.exp: Reported speech: am preparing → was preparing (backshift)

exercises.q: 'We will call you tomorrow,' they promised. → They promised they ___ me the following day.
exercises.exp: Reported speech: will → would

exercises.q: 'Have you finished the task?' the manager asked. → The manager asked if I ___ the task.
exercises.exp: Reported question: have finished → had finished

exercises.q: 'Don't leave without telling me,' he said. → He told me ___ without telling him.
exercises.exp: Reported imperative negative: not to + verb

exercises.q: 'I saw them yesterday,' she said. → She said she ___ them the day before.
exercises.exp: Reported speech: saw → had seen (backshift)

reorder.words: She said that she was very tired after work
He told me not to open the window in the room
They said they would arrive at the hotel the next day
She asked me if I had ever been to Japan
He asked her where she had gone the day before
The teacher told the students to stop talking immediately
She said she could not come to the party that evening
He told us we had to finish the report that day
She asked me what I was doing at that moment
He said he had already seen that film twice
They said they had moved there the year before
She asked him why he was crying in the corridor
He promised he would call me the following morning
She told me not to be late for the meeting
He asked me how long I had been waiting there
The manager said the results would be announced that afternoon
She said she might not be able to come the next day
He asked me if I knew her from somewhere
She asked me to help her carry the heavy box
He told her to get out of his office immediately

passage.text: Last week, I met my old friend Nina at a café. She told me she {{1}} in London for the past two years. She said she {{2}} a very interesting job at a publishing house. She told me she {{3}} her first novel and hoped to finish it by summer. She asked me if I {{4}} her new blog. When I said I hadn't, she asked me {{5}} it as soon as possible. She also said she {{6}} a book tour in Vietnam the following month and {{7}} if I could join her for dinner. She told me she {{8}} a lot and {{9}} to come back to live in Vietnam one day. Before she left, she reminded me {{10}} in touch.

At the press conference, the minister said the government {{1}} a new law about online privacy. She explained that the law {{2}} being discussed for several months. She told reporters that personal data {{3}} better protected under the new rules. A journalist asked her when the law {{4}} into effect. The minister replied that it {{5}} by the end of the year. Another reporter asked whether ordinary people {{6}} anything differently. The minister said they {{7}} to read privacy policies more carefully. She also warned that companies {{8}} fined if they {{9}} the rules. She reminded everyone that the government {{10}} serious about protecting citizens online.

After the match, the coach gave a press conference. He said that his team {{1}} incredibly hard all season. He added that they {{2}} this result since January. He told reporters that the players {{3}} everything they had. When asked about the final, he replied that they {{4}} it one game at a time. He mentioned that two key players {{5}} injured during the match but {{6}} fit for the next round. A journalist asked whether the team {{7}} the tactics. The coach said that he {{8}} about making changes the previous week. He confirmed that the club {{9}} contract talks with the captain and that an announcement {{10}} soon.

My sister came home from her job interview looking worried. She told me that the interview {{1}} longer than she expected. She said the panel {{2}} her many difficult questions. She explained that one interviewer {{3}} her to describe a time she had failed. She admitted that she {{4}} prepared a good answer for that. She told me she {{5}} nervous throughout the whole interview. She added that the panel {{6}} her when they would be in touch. She said she {{7}} the company's response by Friday. She asked me whether I {{8}} she should send a follow-up email. I told her that it {{9}} a good idea and that she {{10}} professional in her message.

At last month's community meeting, several residents spoke about local issues. One woman said that the park near her house {{1}} well-maintained for years but {{2}} recently. She told the council that children {{3}} somewhere safe to play. A man added that the street lights on Oak Road {{4}} for over a month and {{5}} fixed despite several complaints. The council representative replied that the matter {{6}} investigated and that a contractor {{7}} that week. Another resident asked if the new bus route {{8}} extended to the north of town. The representative said she {{9}} certain but {{10}} back to them the following week.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể lại một cuộc trò chuyện thú vị bạn đã có với một người bạn hoặc thành viên gia đình – họ đã nói gì, hỏi gì và yêu cầu gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reported speech: said, told, asked, wanted to know, mentioned
writing_prompts.example: Last Sunday, I had a great conversation with my cousin Lan. She told me she had just been offered a job in Singapore and was very excited about it. She asked me if I had ever lived abroad and wanted to know whether I thought she should accept the offer. I told her that it sounded like a fantastic opportunity. She mentioned that the company had been very impressive during the interview. She also said she would miss her family a lot. She asked me to visit her if she moved, and I promised I would. Before she left, she reminded me not to tell anyone yet because she had not made her final decision.

writing_prompts.vi: Tường thuật lại nội dung một bài phát biểu hoặc bài giảng bạn đã nghe – người đó nói gì, giải thích gì, cảnh báo gì và khuyên gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reported speech with a variety of reporting verbs: explained, warned, advised, stated, suggested
writing_prompts.example: Yesterday, we had a talk from a nutrition expert at school. She explained that many young people were not eating enough vegetables and fruit. She warned us that poor eating habits could lead to serious health problems later in life. She told us that we should drink at least two litres of water every day. She advised us to avoid sugary drinks and fast food as much as possible. She also reminded us that breakfast was the most important meal of the day and that we should never skip it. She suggested that we try cooking simple healthy meals at home and said that eating well did not have to be expensive.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể lại một cuộc phỏng vấn (xin việc, tuyển sinh) – bạn được hỏi gì, bạn đã trả lời ra sao và kết quả là gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reported questions and statements
writing_prompts.example: Last month, I had an important job interview at a marketing company. The interviewer asked me to describe my previous experience and wanted to know why I had applied for the position. I told her that I had always been passionate about creative communication. She asked me whether I could work under pressure and how I handled tight deadlines. I replied that I had managed several projects at university and that I worked best when I had clear goals. She also asked if I spoke any foreign languages, and I told her I could speak English and basic French. At the end, she said the company would contact me within a week. I was delighted when they called and told me I had been selected.

writing_prompts.vi: Tường thuật lại tin tức hoặc bài báo bạn đã đọc – những gì đã xảy ra, ai nói gì và hậu quả được dự đoán là gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reported speech in news context: reported, claimed, stated, warned, announced
writing_prompts.example: I read an interesting article yesterday about climate change. The report stated that global temperatures had risen by more than one degree Celsius since the industrial revolution. Scientists warned that if action was not taken immediately, sea levels would rise significantly by the end of the century. The author also mentioned that many island nations had already reported increased flooding. A leading climate expert claimed that renewable energy was the only long-term solution. She added that governments needed to invest more in solar and wind power. The article concluded by saying that citizens could also make a difference by changing everyday habits such as reducing car use and avoiding unnecessary flights.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về lời khuyên bạn đã nhận từ người lớn hơn – họ đã khuyên bạn điều gì, yêu cầu bạn làm gì và cảnh báo bạn về điều gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Reported advice: told me to, advised me to, warned me not to, suggested that
writing_prompts.example: When I was preparing for university, my teacher gave me some very valuable advice. She told me to start working on my application early and not to leave everything until the last minute. She advised me to choose a course that I was genuinely passionate about rather than one that sounded impressive. She warned me not to pick a career just because of the salary and reminded me that happiness at work was very important. She also said that I should talk to professionals in different fields to find out what their jobs were really like. She encouraged me to be confident in my abilities and suggested that I should take every opportunity to gain experience. I am very grateful for everything she told me.

intermediate.title: B1 Gerund or infinitive: Do, to do, doing
intermediate.content:
📌 Gerund (-ing) – Dùng sau những gì?
1. Sau một số động từ nhất định:
enjoy, finish, suggest, avoid, consider, mind, miss, keep, imagine, deny, admit, practise, give up, risk, can't stand, can't help, look forward to
I enjoy swimming. She finished reading the book. He avoids eating junk food.

2. Sau giới từ:
interested in learning, good at drawing, instead of going, before leaving, without saying

3. Làm chủ ngữ của câu:
Travelling broadens the mind. Swimming is good for you.
📌 Infinitive (to + base) – Dùng sau những gì?
1. Sau một số động từ nhất định:
want, hope, need, decide, plan, offer, promise, refuse, manage, seem, agree, expect, learn, afford, tend, would like, would love
She wants to go. He decided to stay. They managed to escape.

2. Sau tính từ:
It's difficult to understand. She's happy to help. It was nice to meet you.

3. Để diễn tả mục đích (= in order to):
I went to the shop to buy milk.
⚠️ Động từ dùng cả hai – nghĩa khác nhau
CâuNghĩa
I remember locking the door.Nhớ lại việc đã làm (đã khoá rồi)
I remembered to lock the door.Nhớ phải làm gì đó (trước khi quên)
She stopped smoking.Ngừng hẳn việc hút thuốc
She stopped to smoke.Dừng lại để hút thuốc
I tried calling him.Thử gọi xem sao
I tried to call him.Cố gắng gọi (nhưng khó)
I like swimming.Tôi thích bơi (nói chung)
I like to swim in the mornings.Tôi thích bơi (thói quen cụ thể)
📌 Bare infinitive (base form) – Dùng sau gì?
• Sau modal verbs: can, could, will, would, should, must, may, might
She can swim. You should rest.
• Sau make / let / help:
She made me cry. He let me go. Can you help me carry this?
• Sau had better / would rather:
You had better leave now. I'd rather stay home.
I enjoy travelling but I need to save more money first.enjoy + -ing | need + to-infinitive
She stopped to talk to us. vs She stopped talking and left.stopped to talk = paused | stopped talking = quit

exercises.q: She enjoys ___ in the park on Sunday mornings.
exercises.exp: enjoy + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: He decided ___ a new job after the holiday.
exercises.opts: to look for,looking for,look for,looked for
exercises.exp: decide + to-infinitive

exercises.q: Would you mind ___ the window? It's cold.
exercises.exp: mind + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: I'm looking forward ___ you at the conference.
exercises.exp: look forward to + gerund (to là giới từ, không phải to-inf)

exercises.q: She managed ___ the exam despite being ill.
exercises.exp: manage + to-infinitive

exercises.q: I remember ___ the door before I left. I'm sure I did.
exercises.exp: remember + -ing = nhớ lại việc đã làm

exercises.q: Don't forget ___ the door when you leave tonight.
exercises.exp: forget + to-infinitive = quên mất phải làm gì

exercises.q: The doctor advised him ___ smoking immediately.
exercises.exp: advise + object + to-infinitive

exercises.q: I can't stand ___ in long queues.
exercises.exp: can't stand + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: She suggested ___ a different route to avoid the traffic.
exercises.exp: suggest + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: He stopped ___ the newspaper on his way home.
exercises.exp: stopped to buy = dừng lại để mua (mục đích)

exercises.q: She stopped ___ after her doctor gave her a warning.
exercises.exp: stopped smoking = bỏ thuốc lá hẳn

exercises.q: Would you like ___ some tea?
exercises.exp: would like + to-infinitive

exercises.q: I'm not very good at ___ maps.
exercises.exp: good at + gerund (sau giới từ)

exercises.q: He admitted ___ the window by accident.
exercises.exp: admit + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: You had better ___ now or you'll miss the train.
exercises.exp: had better + bare infinitive (no to)

exercises.q: She can't help ___ when she watches sad films.
exercises.exp: can't help + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: They promised ___ in touch after the trip.
exercises.exp: promise + to-infinitive

exercises.q: She tried ___ the door but the handle was broken.
exercises.exp: tried to open = cố mở nhưng khó

exercises.q: He let his daughter ___ his new car.
exercises.exp: let + object + bare infinitive (không có to)

exercises.q: I really enjoy ___ (cook) for my friends at weekends.
exercises.exp: enjoy + gerund

exercises.q: She decided ___ (apply) for the marketing position.
exercises.exp: decide + to-infinitive

exercises.q: He's interested in ___ (learn) how to play the guitar.
exercises.exp: interested in + gerund (sau giới từ)

exercises.q: Please remember ___ (switch off) the lights before you leave.
exercises.exp: remember + to-infinitive = nhớ phải làm gì

exercises.q: I can't afford ___ (buy) a new laptop right now.
exercises.exp: afford + to-infinitive

exercises.q: She gave up ___ (try) to learn Japanese after six months.
exercises.exp: give up + gerund

exercises.q: Would you mind ___ (wait) for a few minutes outside?
exercises.exp: mind + gerund

exercises.q: He agreed ___ (help) us move the furniture.
exercises.exp: agree + to-infinitive

exercises.q: The teacher made the students ___ (rewrite) their essays.
exercises.exp: make + object + bare infinitive

exercises.q: I'd rather ___ (stay) home tonight if that's okay.
exercises.exp: would rather + bare infinitive

exercises.q: She keeps ___ (interrupt) me when I'm talking!
exercises.exp: keep + gerund

exercises.q: They managed ___ (finish) the project before the deadline.
exercises.exp: manage + to-infinitive

exercises.q: He denied ___ (take) the money from the till.
exercises.exp: deny + gerund

exercises.q: She's looking forward to ___ (see) her family over the holidays.
exercises.exp: look forward to + gerund

exercises.q: I expect ___ (hear) from them by the end of the week.
exercises.exp: expect + to-infinitive

exercises.q: She admitted ___ (make) a mistake in the final section of the report.
exercises.exp: admit + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: He promised ___ (send) the documents before the end of the week.
exercises.exp: promise + infinitive (to + verb)

exercises.q: They suggested ___ (take) a different route to avoid the traffic.
exercises.exp: suggest + gerund (-ing)

exercises.q: I would like ___ (speak) to the manager about my concerns, please.
exercises.exp: would like + infinitive (to + verb)

exercises.q: After ___ (walk) for two hours, we finally reached the summit.
exercises.exp: after + gerund (-ing) as preposition

reorder.words: She enjoys jogging in the park on Sunday mornings
He decided to look for a new job after the holiday
I am looking forward to seeing you at the conference
She managed to pass the exam despite being very ill
I remember locking the door before I left the house
He stopped to buy a newspaper on his way home
The doctor advised him to stop smoking immediately
I can not stand waiting in long queues at the supermarket
She suggested taking a different route to avoid the traffic
You had better leave now or you will miss the train
He admitted breaking the window by accident
She is not very good at reading maps in the dark
They promised to keep in touch after the trip abroad
She tried to open the door but the handle was broken
He let his daughter drive his brand new car
I can not help crying when I watch very sad films
Please remember to switch off the lights before you leave
She gave up trying to learn Japanese after six months

passage.text: My sister Mai has always loved {{1}} new things. Last year, she decided {{2}} a pottery class after {{3}} about it online. At first, she struggled {{4}} even the most basic shapes. She thought about {{5}} up, but her teacher encouraged her {{6}} trying. He told her that {{7}} a skill takes time and patience. She kept {{8}} and after a few months, she managed {{9}} some beautiful bowls. Now she is considering {{10}} her own small pottery business. She says she can't imagine {{11}} her hobby and is looking forward to {{12}} her first collection at a local market.

Last spring, he finally managed {{5}} enough and decided {{6}} to Thailand. He was nervous about {{7}} alone but he refused {{8}} the opportunity. Before {{9}}, he spent a week {{10}} Thai phrases. He enjoyed {{11}} street food and meeting locals. He remembers {{12}} completely free for the first time in years. He is already planning {{13}} again next year and can't wait {{14}} new adventures.

My friend Leo has always enjoyed {{1}} new things. Last year, he decided {{2}} rock climbing after {{3}} a documentary about mountaineers. He started {{4}} a local climbing gym three times a week. At first he found it difficult {{5}} the right technique, but he kept {{6}} hard. His instructor advised him {{7}} strength training alongside his climbing sessions. He admitted {{8}} scared during his first outdoor climb, but he refused {{9}} up. He mentioned {{10}} his first real mountain by next spring. His family supports him, though his mother can't help {{11}} worried whenever he goes out. He says he can't imagine {{12}} this sport — it has changed his life.

Running a small business involves {{1}} many different roles at once. I started {{2}} my online shop two years ago after {{3}} my corporate job. I remember {{4}} terrified on the first day. I had to learn {{5}} my accounts, {{6}} my own content, and {{7}} customer enquiries all at the same time. I considered {{8}} an assistant, but at first I couldn't afford it. I kept {{9}} mistakes, but I also kept {{10}}. My mentor encouraged me {{11}} up and reminded me that most successful entrepreneurs had struggled at the beginning. Now I'm planning {{12}} my product range and {{13}} more staff. I love {{14}} my own boss.

Learning a new language requires {{1}} consistent time to it every day. I started {{2}} Spanish two years ago because I wanted {{3}} able to communicate during a trip to South America. I remember {{4}} the first lesson online and {{5}} completely lost. I tried {{6}} every grammar rule but found that {{7}} conversation was much more effective. My tutor suggested {{8}} podcasts in Spanish during my commute. I also practised {{9}} to native speakers online. There were moments when I felt like {{10}} up. But I kept {{11}} and eventually began {{12}} progress. Last summer I managed {{13}} an entire conversation at a restaurant without {{14}} a single word of English.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sở thích hoặc kỹ năng mới bạn muốn học – tại sao bạn muốn thử, bạn dự định luyện tập như thế nào và bạn hy vọng đạt được gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Gerund and infinitive: want to, enjoy, look forward to, plan to, hope to, consider, avoid
writing_prompts.example: I have always wanted to learn how to play the piano but I have never managed to find the time. I really enjoy listening to classical music and I find it very relaxing. I am considering joining a music school near my house and plan to practise for at least thirty minutes every day. I am looking forward to playing my first simple piece and hope to perform in a small concert by the end of the year. I know that mastering an instrument takes a lot of patience, but I am determined to avoid giving up even when it gets difficult. I believe that learning something new keeps the mind active and makes life more interesting.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một người bạn hoặc người thân – họ giỏi làm gì, thích làm gì, tránh làm gì và họ đã quyết định hay từ chối làm gì gần đây
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Mixed gerund/infinitive: good at, enjoy, avoid, decide to, refuse to, manage to, keep
writing_prompts.example: My older brother is one of the most talented people I know. He is exceptionally good at drawing and enjoys spending hours creating detailed illustrations. He avoids watching television because he prefers spending his time doing something creative. Recently, he decided to apply for an art school in the city even though our parents tried to persuade him to choose a more traditional career. He refused to give up his dream and managed to prepare an impressive portfolio in just two months. He keeps improving his skills every day and can't stand wasting time on things that don't interest him. We are all very proud of his dedication.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một kỳ nghỉ hoặc chuyến đi lý tưởng – bạn dự định làm gì, tránh làm gì, muốn thử gì và mong chờ điều gì nhất
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Gerund/infinitive for plans and preferences
writing_prompts.example: Next summer, I am planning to visit Japan with two close friends. I can't wait to experience the food, the temples, and the amazing nature. I hope to visit Kyoto and spend a whole day exploring the bamboo forests. I would love to try eating traditional ramen in a small local restaurant. We plan to avoid travelling during the busiest tourist season and intend to visit quieter areas off the beaten path. I am looking forward to trying on a kimono and learning a few words in Japanese. I also enjoy hiking and hope to climb part of Mount Fuji if we have enough time. It will be the trip of a lifetime.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về việc thay đổi thói quen sống lành mạnh hơn – bạn đã bắt đầu làm gì, từ bỏ điều gì, và hy vọng duy trì điều gì
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Gerund/infinitive with health habits: started, stopped, gave up, decided to, enjoy, keep, manage
writing_prompts.example: Six months ago, I decided to make some important changes to my lifestyle. I started going to the gym three times a week and gave up eating fast food entirely. At first, I found it very difficult to stick to the plan, but I kept trying even when I felt tired. I also stopped drinking sugary drinks and replaced them with water and green tea. I enjoy cooking healthy meals at home and try to avoid eating out too often. I have managed to lose five kilograms and feel much more energetic than before. I am planning to continue these habits and hope to run a five-kilometre race by the end of the year.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một quyết định quan trọng trong cuộc sống – tại sao bạn cân nhắc, bạn đã từ chối hay đồng ý làm gì, và bạn học được gì từ trải nghiệm đó
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Gerund and infinitive in decision-making contexts
writing_prompts.example: Two years ago, I had to make one of the hardest decisions of my life. I was offered a place at a prestigious university far from home, and I had to decide whether to accept it. I considered staying in my hometown and going to a local university because I was worried about leaving my family. However, after thinking carefully, I agreed to take the opportunity. My parents encouraged me to go and promised to support me. At first, I couldn't help feeling homesick, but I gradually learnt to manage on my own. I managed to make wonderful new friends and developed a lot of confidence. I am glad to have taken that difficult step because it changed my life completely.
